name: Test LiteLLM Version on Cloud Run

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      litellm_version:
        description: 'The litellm version to test, eg. v1.61.0'
        required: true

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      previous_revision: ${{ steps.get-previous-revision.outputs.revision }}
      current_revision: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.revision }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Authenticate with Google Cloud
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v1
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_DEPLOY_SA }}

      - name: Set up Google Cloud SDK
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v1
        with:
          project_id: ${{ secrets.GCP_PROJECT_ID }}

      - name: Get previous revision
        id: get-previous-revision
        run: |
          REVISION=$(gcloud run services describe litellm-testing --region ${{ secrets.GCP_LOCATION }} --format="value(status.latestReadyRevisionName)")
          echo "revision=$REVISION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Current revision: $REVISION"
          
      - name: Deploy to Cloud Run
        run: |
          gcloud run deploy litellm-testing  \
            --image "litellm/litellm:${{ inputs.litellm_version }}" \
            --port 4000 \
            --region ${{ secrets.GCP_LOCATION }} \
            --project ${{ secrets.GCP_PROJECT_ID  }} \
            --service-account ${{ secrets.GCP_PROJECT_SA_NAME }} \
            --set-env-vars STORE_MODEL_IN_DB=false \
            --set-env-vars model_list=${{ secrets.LITELLM_MODEL_LIST }}  \
            --memory 512Mi \
            --cpu 1 \
            --min-instances 1 \
            --concurrency 5 \
            --timeout 500 \
            --execution-environment gen1 \
            --max-instances 10 \
            --allow-unauthenticated \
            --min-instances 1 \
            --ingress all \
            --min 1
          NEW_REVISION=$(gcloud run services describe litellm-testing --region ${{ secrets.GCP_LOCATION }} --format="value(status.latestReadyRevisionName)")
          echo "revision=$NEW_REVISION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "New revision: $NEW_REVISION"
      
  test:
    needs: deploy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install pytest requests

      - name: Run tests
        id: run-tests
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
          SERVICE_URL: ${{ secrets.LITELLM_TESTING_BASE_URL }}
        run: |
          # Wait for service to be fully available
          ls
          sleep 10
          pytest ./tests/lamatic/test.py -v
          # Always fail
          exit 1
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Post litellm version to webhook
        run: |
          STATUS=${{ steps.run-tests.outcome }}
          echo "STATUS: $STATUS"
          curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -d '{"litellm_version": "${{ inputs.litellm_version }}", "status": "test-$STATUS", "environment": "testing"}' \
            ${{ secrets.WEBHOOK_URL }}

      - name: Rollback on test failure
        if: steps.run-tests.outcome != 'success'
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v1
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_DEPLOY_SA }}
          
      - name: Configure gcloud for rollback
        if: steps.run-tests.outcome != 'success'
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v1
        with:
          project_id: ${{ secrets.GCP_PROJECT_ID }}
          
      - name: Execute rollback
        if: steps.run-tests.outcome != 'success'
        run: |
          echo "Tests failed. Rolling back to previous revision: ${{ needs.deploy.outputs.previous_revision }}"
          gcloud run services update-traffic litellm-testing \
            --region ${{ secrets.GCP_LOCATION }} \
            --to-revisions ${{ needs.deploy.outputs.previous_revision }}=100
            
      - name: Delete failed revision
        if: steps.run-tests.outcome != 'success'
        run: |
          echo "Deleting failed revision: ${{ needs.deploy.outputs.current_revision }}"
          gcloud run revisions delete ${{ needs.deploy.outputs.current_revision }} \
            --region ${{ secrets.GCP_LOCATION }} \
            --namespace ${{ secrets.GCP_PROJECT_ID  }}
